findings.description: Broken indentation: getSession mock is flush-left (2-space indent) while sibling getUser and onAuthStateChange are at 6-space indent. Should match surrounding code at 6 spaces.
Broken indentation: mockGetSession.mockResolvedValue is at column 0 (no indent) while surrounding code is at 4-space indent inside the it() block.

Stale comment: '// /api routes handle their own JWT auth via FastAPI -- do not redirect them' sits above PUBLIC_PREFIXES but /api was removed from that array. The comment now misleadingly describes PUBLIC_PREFIXES when the actual /api handling moved to the early return at line 28. Either move the comment to line 27 or delete it (line 27 already has its own comment).

Inline object literal in render: value={{ revalidateOnFocus: false }} creates a new object on every render. CLAUDE.md performance rule: 'No inline object/array in render without useMemo'. Should hoist to a module-level constant since the value never changes.
